title: Freelancers
metaTitle: Free Invoicing Software for Freelancers · Get Paid Faster · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Free professional invoices, quotes and payment links for freelancers worldwide. Bill in any currency, track expenses and get paid online. No signup cost, free forever.
keywords: freelancer invoicing, free invoice software for freelancers, freelance billing, get paid online, invoice in any currency, freelance expense tracking
heroTitle: Look professional, get paid faster
heroSubtitle: Send polished invoices and quotes, take payment online, and keep your numbers tidy without an accountant. Paper & Pen gives a solo professional the tools big firms use, free forever.

sections.title: From quote to paid, all in one place
sections.body: A clear quote wins trust, and a clean invoice gets you paid. Send a branded quotation, convert the approved one into an invoice without re-typing, and attach a payment link so clients pay online in seconds. Set up recurring invoices for retainers and let polite reminders chase anyone who forgets. You spend your time on the work, not the admin.
items: Branded quotes and invoices in minutes

sections.title: Numbers that look after themselves
sections.body: Track expenses, log payments and keep every document in one place, so when tax time comes there is nothing to dig for. Paper & Pen works in any currency for clients anywhere, applies any tax rate you need, and was built in Oman with native OMR, AED and SAR plus 5% VAT for GCC freelancers. It is free forever for invoicing, so a one-person business pays nothing to look professional.

faqs.q: Is it really free for freelancers?
faqs.a: Yes. Invoicing, quotes, receipts and payment tracking are free forever, with no watermark and no limit. You only pay if you add modules like Accounting or Inventory, which most solo freelancers never need.
Yes. Bill in USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR or any currency, with correct decimals and any tax rate, so you can work with clients anywhere in the world.
Add a payment link to your invoice and clients can pay by card online the moment they open it. You can also record bank transfers and cash.
Yes. Set up recurring invoices for monthly clients and retainers, and let automatic reminders chase any late payments for you.
No. Invoicing is simple enough to start in minutes. Your expenses and payments are tracked for you, so you stay tax-ready without an accountant.

ctaSub: Create a free workspace, send your first professional invoice today and get paid online.
